description: Le Parisien is a French news publication website covering national, local, sports, culture, and business news. Its public site also offers subscriptions, podcasts, videos, games, and RSS feeds for readers.
summary: Le Parisien exposes a public MCP server at `https://app-mcp-mobile.leparisien.fr/_mcp`; no public developer HTTP, GraphQL, or CLI surfaces were found on `leparisien.fr`.
